commands.review_summary:
The branch removes the Netlify-only `public/_redirects` rule and adds an equivalent `/discord` 302 redirect to `vercel.json`.

Reproducibility: yes. Production `https://openclaw.ai/discord` currently returns HTTP 404, and current main still keeps the rule only in Netlify `_redirects` while `vercel.json` has no `/discord` redirect.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer Vercel deployment proof and routing-scope confirmation; automation cannot supply the contributor's real-environment proof.

target.title: fix(config): move /discord redirect from Netlify _redirects to vercel.json
target.body:
## Summary

`public/_redirects` uses Netlify syntax (`/discord https://discord.gg/clawd 302`) but the site deploys on Vercel. Vercel ignores the `_redirects` file, so visiting `/discord` returns a 404 instead of redirecting to the Discord invite link.

This moves the redirect into `vercel.json` using the native Vercel `redirects` config and removes the stale Netlify `_redirects` file.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** `/discord` redirect broken because `_redirects` uses Netlify syntax on a Vercel-deployed site.

**Real environment tested:** Production site at https://openclaw.ai, macOS arm64, curl 8.7.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

Before fix (current production):

```
$ curl -sI -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} -> %{redirect_url}\n" https://openclaw.ai/discord
HTTP 404 ->
```

**Evidence after fix:**

The `_redirects` file contained one rule:
```
/discord https://discord.gg/clawd 302
```

This is Netlify-specific syntax. The `vercel.json` now contains:
```json
{
  "redirects": [
    { "source": "/discord", "destination": "https://discord.gg/clawd", "statusCode": 302 }
  ]
}
```

After deploy, `curl` should return:
```
HTTP 302 -> https://discord.gg/clawd
```

**Observed result after fix:** The Vercel `redirects` config is the documented way to handle redirects on Vercel. The JSON is valid and follows the exact schema from https://vercel.com/docs/projects/project-configuration#redirects. The redirect will take effect on the next deploy.

**What was not tested:** Cannot verify the live redirect without deploying. Verified JSON validity and correct Vercel config schema locally.
target.author: sebtardif
